diffs.diff:
--- a/model.py
+++ b/model.py
@@ -26,9 +26,13 @@
     def get_features(self, x):

         if self.freeze_backbone:

             with torch.no_grad():

-                feats = self.clip.get_image_features(pixel_values=x)

+                vision_out = self.clip.vision_model(pixel_values=x, return_dict=True)

+                pooled = vision_out.pooler_output

+                feats = self.clip.visual_projection(pooled)

         else:

-            feats = self.clip.get_image_features(pixel_values=x)

+            vision_out = self.clip.vision_model(pixel_values=x, return_dict=True)

+            pooled = vision_out.pooler_output

+            feats = self.clip.visual_projection(pooled)

         feats = feats / feats.norm(dim=-1, keepdim=True).clamp_min(1e-6)

         return feats
